fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com) -> Get API Key

fields.label: Model
fields.helpText: Gemini 3 Flash Preview is the latest. 2.5 Flash has generous free tier (1,500 req/day). Pro is most accurate.

healthcheck_config.description: Lists available Gemini models to validate the API key

metadata.summary: Google Gemini Vision API for OCR, document understanding, and image analysis. Supports images and PDFs natively with up to 3,600 pages per request.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to aistudio.google.com
2. Click 'Get API Key' in the top-right
3. Create a new API key (or use existing)
4. Copy the key and paste it here

Free tier: 1,500 requests/day for Flash, 50 requests/day for Pro.
